message:
feat(stdlib): add web/network modules (telnetlib, xmlrpc, urllib, cgi, wsgiref)

- telnetlib: Telnet class with RFC 854/855 option constants
- xmlrpc.client/server: ServerProxy, XMLRPCServer, marshalling types
- http.cookiejar: CookieJar, cookie policies, FileCookieJar
- urllib.request/error/robotparser: urlopen, Request, handlers, exceptions
- cgi: FieldStorage, parse functions
- wsgiref.*: WSGI server, handlers, validators, utilities

files.patch:
